meaning: First-person present tense of 'jebati' (to fuck).
cultural_context: The absolute building block of all Balkan curses. Almost every sentence starts with 'Jebem ti...' (I fuck your...).
example_usage: Jebem ti sve! (I fuck your everything!)

meaning: Contraction of 'jebi ga' (fuck him/it).
cultural_context: The most commonly used word in the Balkans. It is essentially verbal punctuation, roughly meaning 'that's life' or 'oh well' when something bad happens.
example_usage: Pao sam test, jebiga. (I failed the test, fuck it/oh well.)

meaning: Penis.
cultural_context: Highly versatile. Can mean 'nothing' (e.g., 'Koji kurac?' = What the fuck? / 'Dobićeš kurac' = You'll get nothing/dick).
example_usage: Koji kurac hoćeš? (What the fuck/dick do you want?)

meaning: Female genitalia.
cultural_context: Can be an anatomical slur, or describe an incredibly beautiful woman (Dobra pička), or mean a coward (On je pička = He is a pussy).
example_usage: Mrš u pičku materinu! (Go to your mother's cunt/off!)

meaning: Feces or someone with a terrible character.
cultural_context: A classic noun insult.
example_usage: Ti si jedno obično govno. (You are just a regular piece of shit.)

meaning: The classic, ubiquitous mother-fucking insult.
cultural_context: Used in anger, surprise, or just to emphasize a point.
example_usage: Vozi jebem ti mater! (Drive, fuck your mother!)

meaning: A terrifyingly escalated version targeting deceased parental figures.
cultural_context: Balkan swearing famously escalates to the dead to inflict maximum emotional damage.
example_usage: Šta radiš, jebem ti mrtvu mater? (What are you doing, I fuck your dead mother?)

literal_translation: I fuck everything you have on the list
english_equivalent: fuck your entire existence / fuck them all
meaning: A blanket curse meaning 'I will systematically fuck every single person on the list of people you care about'.
cultural_context: A beautifully bureaucratic and mathematically thorough Balkan curse.
example_usage: Jebem ti sve po spisku! (Fuck everyone on your list!)

meaning: A sharp, guttural command equivalent to 'beat it' or 'piss off'.
cultural_context: Used constantly to dismiss dogs or annoying people.
example_usage: Mrš odavde! (Fuck off from here!)

meaning: Cursing the very sun that shines upon someone.
cultural_context: In the Balkans, cursing the sun, sky, or weather is a standard way to express massive frustration.
example_usage: Jebem ti sunce krvavo! (I fuck your bloody sun!)

meaning: A curse upon someone's biological makeup and bloodline.
cultural_context: Highly aggressive.
example_usage: Jebem ti krv Isusovu! (I fuck your Jesus' blood!)

meaning: A man who fucks often.
cultural_context: Can be used neutrally or positively among men to mean someone who gets a lot of dates.
example_usage: On je veliki jebač. (He is a massive player/fucker.)

meaning: Used as an intensifier exactly like English 'fucking'.
cultural_context: Very common.
example_usage: Ovo je jebeno nevjerovatno. (This is fucking unbelievable.)

meaning: Female genitalia.
cultural_context: Often used to describe a cowardly, weak, or treacherous man ('on je pizda' = he is a cunt/bitch).
example_usage: Šuti, pizdo jedna. (Shut up, you cunt.)

meaning: A direct attack invoking the listener's mother's genitals.
cultural_context: The standard massive insult of the region.
example_usage: Idi u pičku materinu! (Go into your mother's cunt! / Go fuck yourself!)

meaning: A prostitute.
cultural_context: The pan-Slavic word for a whore. Used constantly.
example_usage: Vidi onu kurvu. (Look at that whore.)

meaning: Son of a prostitute.
cultural_context: Direct, combative insult.
example_usage: Dođi vamo, kurvin sine. (Come here, you son of a bitch.)

meaning: From 'drkati' (to jerk off). A man who masturbates.
cultural_context: Means a useless idiot or someone doing annoying busywork.
example_usage: Koji si ti drkadžija. (What a wanker you are.)

meaning: To masturbate.
cultural_context: Can mean literal masturbation or metaphorically 'bullshitting' someone (Ne drkaj me = Don't jerk me around/bullshit me).
example_usage: Ne drkaj kurac! (Don't jerk the dick / Stop doing useless shit!)

meaning: Short for 'Nabijem te na kurac' (I impale you on my dick).
cultural_context: A violent, deeply historical curse referencing Ottoman impalement, updated with a sexual twist.
example_usage: Nabijem te na kurac! (Impale yourself on my dick!)

meaning: A direct vulgar attack on the deity.
cultural_context: Despite religious histories, cursing God is one of the most common and explosive forms of Balkan profanity.
example_usage: Boga ti jebem krvavog! (I fuck your bloody God!)

meaning: Cursing someone's daily bread/survival.
cultural_context: Bread holds immense cultural and religious significance. To fuck someone's bread is to curse their basic sustenance.
example_usage: Jebem ti hljeb i sol! (I fuck your bread and salt!)

meaning: The physical anatomical anus.
cultural_context: Used similarly to English 'asshole', though 'supak' is more common.
example_usage: Dlakavi čmar. (Hairy asshole.)

meaning: The asshole.
cultural_context: A very common insult for a despicable, mean, or unfair person.
example_usage: On je najveći šupak. (He is the biggest asshole.)

meaning: Someone who shits a lot (meaning they talk a lot of nonsense).
cultural_context: Slightly lighter than kurac or šupak. Basically calling someone a chronic liar or braggart.
example_usage: Šuti seronjo. (Shut up, shitter/bullshitter.)

meaning: Cursing someone's entire clan, ancestors, or ethnicity.
cultural_context: Highlights the deep tribal history of the Balkans.
example_usage: Jebem ti pleme i sjeme! (I fuck your tribe and your seed/sperm!)

meaning: Animal dung or gross garbage.
cultural_context: A very heavy insult targeting someone's character. 'Ti si obično đubre' means 'You are absolute scum'.
example_usage: Đubre jedno! (You piece of trash!)

meaning: Homosexual person.
cultural_context: Used heavily in a derogatory way, also used in politics/sports to insult referees.
example_usage: Sudija pederu! (Referee, faggot!)

meaning: A woman whose appearance practically invites men to fuck her.
cultural_context: While highly vulgar, it is often intended as a supreme compliment between men about a woman.
example_usage: Kako je jebozovna. (She's so fuckable/hot.)

english_equivalent: to fuck around / to mess with
meaning: To tease, joke around with, or mess with someone.
cultural_context: An essential verb. 'Zajebancija' means a joke or having fun.
example_usage: Nemoj me zajebavati. (Don't fuck with me/bullshit me.)

meaning: Commanding someone to 'smoke' (suck on) your penis.
cultural_context: Standard aggressive insult.
example_usage: Ma popuši mi kurac! (Just suck my dick!)

meaning: The imperative to detach via fucking (to fuck off).
cultural_context: A direct translation of the English 'fuck off' conceptually, but using the slavic prefix 'od-' (away).
example_usage: Odjebi od mene! (Fuck off away from me!)

meaning: A herd of mindless livestock.
cultural_context: Often yelled at bad drivers, crowds, or someone devoid of manners.
example_usage: Ponašaš se kao stoka. (You're acting like cattle.)

meaning: An opanak is a traditional Balkan leather shoe.
cultural_context: A highly creative, slightly comedic 'softer' curse used by older people.
example_usage: Jebem ti opanak i čarapu! (I fuck your shoe and your sock!)

meaning: A woman who is deeply stupid.
cultural_context: Often associated with airhead or bimbo characteristics.
example_usage: Ona je prava glupača. (She is a real stupid bitch.)

meaning: An idiot.
cultural_context: Universally understood.
example_usage: Koji si ti idiot. (What an idiot you are.)

meaning: Used to describe something belonging to the mother.
cultural_context: Most commonly paired with pička (cunt) or psovke (curses).
example_usage: U pičku materinu. (Into the mother's cunt.)

meaning: An augmented form of kurva.
cultural_context: The '-šina' suffix implies something monstrous, oversized, and disgusting.
example_usage: Koja je to kurvašina. (What a massive slut she is.)

meaning: A vulgar peasant without manners.
cultural_context: A deeply offensive classist insult against people from rural areas or those who act loud and uncultured in the city.
example_usage: Ponašaš se kao seljačina. (Acting like a hillbilly.)

meaning: A cretin or deeply annoying person.
cultural_context: Very common non-vulgar insult.
example_usage: Makni se kretenu. (Move it, cretin.)

meaning: To plug a hole.
cultural_context: Telling someone to plug up their mouth.
example_usage: Usta te jebo, začepi. (Fuck your mouth, shut up.)

meaning: Cursing someone's offspring.
cultural_context: Widely considered the absolute darkest, most unforgivable line to cross. Will result in horrific violence.
example_usage: Jebem ti dijete u kolijevci! (I fuck your child in the crib!)

meaning: Usually means a race car. As slang, it means someone rushing around stupidly or a generalized idiot.
cultural_context: Common youth slang.
example_usage: Koji si ti bolid. (What a fast idiot you are.)

meaning: A dirty, cheap tramp.
cultural_context: Differs slightly from kurva. Kurva implies transactional sex; drolja implies someone trashy and cheap.
example_usage: Ona drolja iz kafane. (That tramp from the bar.)

meaning: Cursing the aunt.
cultural_context: Sometimes used instead of 'mother' to soften the blow or be oddly specific.
example_usage: Jebem ti tetku pijanu. (I fuck your drunk aunt.)

literal_translation: I fuck you in the mouth
meaning: Specifically targeting the mouth.
cultural_context: Usually used to shut someone up.
example_usage: Jebem te u usta lažljiva! (I fuck you in your lying mouth!)

meaning: A unified noun made from 'puši' (suck) and 'kurac' (dick).
cultural_context: Classic vulgar insult.
example_usage: On je jedan obični pušikurac. (He is just a regular cocksucker.)

literal_translation: I impale you on my dick
english_equivalent: fuck off and die / up yours
meaning: The full expression of 'nabijem te'.
cultural_context: An extremely aggressive, dismissive insult.
example_usage: Idi drkaj, nabijem te na kurac! (Go jerk off, impale yourself on my dick!)

meaning: The buttocks.
cultural_context: Very mild. 'Uđi mi u guzicu' (Get into my ass/kiss my ass).
example_usage: Ne budi dlakava guzica. (Don't be a hairy ass.)

meaning: Someone who talks absolute shit constantly.
cultural_context: From the verb 'srati' (to shit).
example_usage: Koji si ti serator. (What a bullshitter you are.)

meaning: The act of shitting, or something that is shit.
cultural_context: Equivalent to English 'bullshit' or 'crap'.
example_usage: Ovo je obično sranje. (This is regular bullshit.)

meaning: To complain, whine, or act cowardly (like a pizda).
cultural_context: Very descriptive slang.
example_usage: Šta tu pizdatis? (What are you bitching about here?)

meaning: A female dog.
cultural_context: In the Balkans, calling someone a dog/kučka is considered a heavier character insult about loyalty than it is in English.
example_usage: Ona je prava kučka. (She is a real bitch.)

meaning: An ugly, stray dog.
cultural_context: Used for men to describe someone utterly devoid of honor or loyalty.
example_usage: Pseto jedno! (You absolute hound!)

meaning: A female turkey.
cultural_context: A classic slightly comedic insult for a woman who is acting incredibly silly or unintelligent.
example_usage: Šuti, tuko jedna! (Shut up, you turkey!)

meaning: A donkey.
cultural_context: To be stubborn, stupid, and uncooperative.
example_usage: Glup si kao magarac. (You're as stupid as a donkey.)

meaning: A male who is stupid.
cultural_context: The standard male insult for lack of brains.
example_usage: Ne budi takav glupan. (Don't be such a dumbass.)

meaning: Someone with massive testicles (muda).
cultural_context: Can mean someone who is brave, or in an insulting way, someone who is swaggering and arrogant.
example_usage: Vidi ovog mudonje. (Look at this big baller/arrogant guy.)

meaning: A woman with large breasts (sise).
cultural_context: Often used as a crude identifier.
example_usage: Ona sisata kurva. (That busty whore.)

meaning: An extreme ethnic/religious slur against Bosniaks (Bosnian Muslims).
cultural_context: Highly offensive. Tied to the Yugoslav Wars and ethnic cleansing. Using this will start a war.
example_usage: Mrtvi balija. (Dead balija.)

meaning: Refers to the WWII Croatian fascist movement.
cultural_context: A vicious slur used primarily by Serbs and Bosniaks against Croats.
example_usage: Jebem ti mater ustašku. (I fuck your fascist mother.)

meaning: Refers to the Serbian nationalist/monarchist WWII and 90s paramilitary movement.
cultural_context: A slur used by Bosniaks and Croats against Serbs.
example_usage: Četničko govno. (Chetnik piece of shit.)

meaning: Romani person.
cultural_context: Widely used as a slur to mean someone is dirty, untrustworthy, or cheap.
example_usage: Ne budi cigan. (Don't be a gypsy.)

meaning: A derogatory slang derived from what Albanians call themselves (Shqiptar) but repurposed by Slavs as a severe slur.
cultural_context: Used to denote someone as primitive, criminal, or an enemy of the state in Serbia/Macedonia.
example_usage: Jebem ti šiptarsku mater. (I fuck your Albanian mother.)

meaning: A targeted blasphemy against Christian faith.
cultural_context: Most heavily used by Croats or Atheist ex-Yugoslavs.
example_usage: Isusa ti jebem! (I fuck your Jesus!)

literal_translation: that I fuck everything of yours that is sick
meaning: Cursing someone's diseases or vulnerable relatives.
cultural_context: A breathtakingly cruel curse used to show absolute lack of empathy.
example_usage: Da ti jebem sve bolesno u kući. (I fuck everything sick in your house.)

meaning: A child born out of wedlock.
cultural_context: An archaic historical curse, still used to imply someone is worthless.
example_usage: Malo kopile! (You little bastard!)

meaning: A disgusting, unnatural animal.
cultural_context: A heavy verbal blow against someone you find morally repulsive.
example_usage: Marš, skote jedan! (March/Fuck off, you beast!)

meaning: A literal compound noun translation of the English motherfucker.
cultural_context: A newer slang term. Traditionally, the Balkans used phrase forms (jebem ti mater), but this noun form has gained traction via Hollywood movies.
example_usage: Koji mamojebac. (What a motherfucker.)

meaning: Cursing the heavens above.
cultural_context: Similar to cursing the sun, to express ultimate rage against the cosmos.
example_usage: Nebo ti jebem! (I fuck your sky!)

meaning: A place so remote and desolate that wolves go there to fuck.
cultural_context: One of the most poetic descriptors in the language for a horrible, remote village or town.
example_usage: Živim u nekoj vukojebini. (I live in some wolf-fucking-place.)

english_equivalent: hop the fuck away / fuck off quickly
meaning: A creative variation telling someone to fuck off immediately by hopping like a rabbit.
cultural_context: Highly sarcastic.
example_usage: A sad, odjeb u skokovima! (And now, hop the fuck away!)

english_equivalent: I don't give a fuck / my ass aches
meaning: An expression meaning your dick physically hurts from how little you care about a situation.
cultural_context: The standard Balkan response to someone else's problems or complaints.
example_usage: Boli me kurac za tvoj auto. (My dick hurts [I don't give a fuck] about your car.)

meaning: Someone cutting corners, tying testicles in knots instead of working. A chronic bullshitter.
cultural_context: An incredible descriptive noun for someone who talks a big game but does nothing.
example_usage: On je običan mrsomud. (He is just a ball-tangler.)

english_equivalent: you are fucked / you're in deep shit
meaning: When the prefix 'na-' is added to 'jeb-', it means to accumulate suffering. Meaning you have walked into a catastrophic situation.
cultural_context: Yelled primarily as a threat.
example_usage: Sad si najebao! (Now you are totally fucked!)

literal_translation: I fuck you in the ear
meaning: A bizarre anatomical threat targeting the ear.
cultural_context: Often used because it avoids the cliché of the mouth or ass, making the threat uniquely confusing and terrifying.
example_usage: Ma jebem te u uho glupo. (I fuck you in your stupid ear.)

meaning: Literally means to finish/conclude a task, but is universally slang for male ejaculation.
cultural_context: Common sexual vulgarity.
example_usage: Svršio sam. (I came.)

meaning: A command to gorge yourself by sucking on a penis.
cultural_context: The intensified version of 'popuši mi'.
example_usage: Ma napuši se kurca! (Gorge yourself on a dick!)

meaning: An arrogant, overconfident woman.
cultural_context: Used to describe a woman acting highly entitled.
example_usage: Koja si ti drska pička. (What an arrogant cunt you are.)

meaning: Breasts.
cultural_context: A completely standard vulgarity.
example_usage: Ima dobre sise. (She has good tits.)

meaning: Testicles.
cultural_context: Used to describe courage ('Ima muda' = He has balls) or frustration ('Puni su mi muda' = My balls are full / I'm fed up).
example_usage: Ne hvataj me za muda. (Don't grab my balls / stop annoying me.)

meaning: An augmentative, heavily insulting version of kurva.
cultural_context: The '-etina' suffix implies something large and disgusting.
example_usage: Ona je obična kurvetina. (She is a regular mega slut.)

meaning: A portmanteau of 'koji' (which) and 'kurac' (dick).
cultural_context: An expression of absolute confusion or frustration.
example_usage: Kojekurac ti hoćeš? (What the dick do you want?)

meaning: A statement of maximum frustration, meaning one's patience (dick) has reached absolute capacity.
cultural_context: One of the most commonly used expressions in the Balkans when someone's patience runs out.
example_usage: Pun mi je kurac ovog posla! (My dick is full of this job!)

literal_translation: go to three of your mother's cunts
english_equivalent: go far away and fuck off
meaning: An escalated version of 'u pičku materinu'.
cultural_context: The addition of 'tri' (three) adds a geometric, almost mythological distance to where you are telling the person to go.
example_usage: Ma idi u tri lepe pičke materine! (Go to three beautiful mother's cunts!)

meaning: A stain or result of masturbation.
cultural_context: Calling a human being an 'izdrkotina' means they are a worthless mistake of a bodily function.
example_usage: Mala izdrkotino! (You little jerk-off stain!)

meaning: A child or young person who still drools (balavi).
cultural_context: Used to dismiss the opinions or actions of someone younger.
example_usage: Slušaj ovamo, balavče. (Listen here, snot-nosed kid.)

english_equivalent: dumb as a rock / fucking stupid
meaning: Equating someone's brain power to a penis.
cultural_context: A classic simile.
example_usage: On je dečko malo glup ko kurac. (The boy is a little dumb as a dick.)

meaning: A fool (budala) modified by the adjective form of fuck (jebena).
cultural_context: A very standard insult.
example_usage: Ne budi jebena budala. (Don't be a fucking fool.)

meaning: A creepy, ghastly looking person or creature.
cultural_context: Used heavily to insult someone's bizarre looks or terrible fashion.
example_usage: Vidi one spodobe. (Look at that freak.)

meaning: Describing a situation that is corrupt, chaotic, or cheap.
cultural_context: A racist idiom heavily embedded in the culture to describe anything untrustworthy.
example_usage: Ovo su ciganska posla, ne diraj to. (This is gypsy business, don't touch it.)

meaning: A female chicken.
cultural_context: Similar to 'tuka', used to describe a woman who is loud, gossipy, and unintelligent.
example_usage: Glupa kokoško! (Stupid chicken!)

meaning: An arrogant, loud, usually rural young man.
cultural_context: Used for guys who act tough but are actually just uncultured.
example_usage: Pravi si đilkoš. (You're a real loudmouth.)

english_equivalent: he lost his shit / went crazy
meaning: The verb form of entering a state of 'pizda' (cunt) meaning utter rage or madness.
cultural_context: Highly descriptive emotional state.
example_usage: Toliko me naživcirao da sam popizdio. (He annoyed me so much that I went cunt/lost my shit.)

english_equivalent: to fuck up completely / to suffer consequences
meaning: The infinitive verb for suffering the consequences of a terrible mistake.
cultural_context: If a storm is coming, or the boss is angry, 'Svi ćemo najebati' (We are all going to be fucked).
example_usage: Ako ovo padne, najebali smo. (If this drops, we are totally fucked.)

meaning: An exclamation of awe, shock, or disgust.
cultural_context: Often said while looking at something impressive or horrifying. Not directed at the listener.
example_usage: Vidi auto, jebo majku svoju! (Look at the car, he fucked his own mother! [Holy shit!] )

meaning: Describing a situation or an object that is highly complex, dangerous, or difficult.
cultural_context: A math test can be 'zajebano', or a dangerous curve on a road.
example_usage: Situacija je jako zajebana. (The situation is very fucked up/difficult.)

meaning: Adding the adjective 'bloody' (krvavo) to the sun creates a uniquely apocalyptic curse.
cultural_context: A legendary intensification in Balkan swearing.
example_usage: Jebem ti krvavo sunce, što si to uradio?! (I fuck your bloody sun, why did you do that?!)

meaning: A cow.
cultural_context: Used to describe a woman who is perceived as fat, lazy, or particularly annoying.
example_usage: Miči se, kravo! (Move, you cow!)

meaning: A witch.
cultural_context: Used similarly to English to describe a mean, cruel older woman.
example_usage: Ona stara vještica. (That old witch.)
